---
title: "Data Import"
author: "Group #2"
date: "2026-04-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r library}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

```{r football}
cfb13 <- read.csv("cfb13.csv")
cfb14 <- read.csv("cfb14.csv")
cfb15 <- read.csv("cfb15.csv")
cfb16 <- read.csv("cfb16.csv")
cfb17 <- read.csv("cfb17.csv")
cfb18 <- read.csv("cfb18.csv")
cfb19 <- read.csv("cfb19.csv")
cfb20 <- read.csv("cfb20.csv")
cfb21 <- read.csv("cfb21.csv")
cfb22 <- read.csv("cfb22.csv")
cfb23 <- read.csv("cfb23.csv")
cfb_list <- list("2013" = cfb13,
  "2014" = cfb14,
  "2015" = cfb15,
  "2016" = cfb16,
  "2017" = cfb17,
  "2018" = cfb18,
  "2019" = cfb19,
  "2020" = cfb20,
  "2021" = cfb21,
  "2022" = cfb22,
  "2023" = cfb23
)


# Combine datasets
cfb_cleaned <- imap(cfb_list, ~ .x %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character),
         Year = as.numeric(.y)))

cfb_all <- bind_rows(cfb_cleaned)


# Clean strings
cfb_all <- cfb_all %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~str_trim(.))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~str_replace_all(., "Â", ""))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~na_if(., ""))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~na_if(., "NA")))
cfb_all <- cfb_all %>%
  filter(Average.Time.of.Possession.per.Game != "Reclassifying")


# Convert time
cfb_all <- cfb_all %>%
  separate(Average.Time.of.Possession.per.Game,
           into = c("min", "sec"),
           sep = ":",
           convert = TRUE)
cfb_all <- cfb_all %>%
  mutate(avg_top_min = min + sec / 60)


champions <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Year, ~Champion,
  2013, "Florida St. (ACC)",
  2014, "Ohio St. (Big Ten)",
  2015, "Alabama (SEC)",
  2016, "Clemson (ACC)",
  2017, "Alabama (SEC)",
  2018, "Clemson (ACC)",
  2019, "LSU (SEC)",
  2020, "Alabama (SEC)",
  2021, "Georgia (SEC)",
  2022, "Georgia (SEC)",
  2023, "Michigan (Big Ten)"
)

cfb_all
```

```{r model}
cfb_situational <- cfb_all %>%
  mutate(
    wins = as.numeric(Win),
    games = as.numeric(Games),

    third_down_pct = as.numeric(X3rd.Percent),
    fourth_down_pct = as.numeric(X4th.Percent),

    redzone_attempts = as.numeric(Redzone.Attempts),
    redzone_scores = as.numeric(Redzone.Scores),
    redzone_eff = ifelse(redzone_attempts > 0,
                         redzone_scores / redzone_attempts,
                         NA),

    kick_return_avg = as.numeric(Avg.Yard.per.Kickoff.Return)
  ) %>%
  select(Team, Year, wins,
         third_down_pct,
         fourth_down_pct,
         redzone_eff,
         kick_return_avg) %>%
  na.omit()
```

```{r}
cfb_situational %>%
  group_by(wins) %>%
  summarise(avg_3rd = mean(third_down_pct, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = wins, y = avg_3rd)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "blue") +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(
    title = "3rd Down % vs Wins",
    x = "Wins",
    y = "Average 3rd Down %"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
cfb_situational %>%
  group_by(wins) %>%
  summarise(avg_redzone = mean(redzone_eff, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = wins, y = avg_redzone)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(color = "darkgreen") +
  labs(
    title = "Red Zone Efficiency vs Wins",
    x = "Wins",
    y = "Average Red Zone Efficiency"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
